app.name: REACTOR: Freedom
app.subtitle: A control panel for reclaiming energy, money and self-command.

auth.hero_text: Cravings arrive fast. Freedom is built from small wins: one clean day, one beaten urge, one person beside you.
auth.hero_motto: Do not quit alone. Build your freedom reactor.
auth.hero_motto_body: Track clean days, survive risky minutes, turn old spending into a goal and get support when the day gets loud.

hero_features.title: Daily control
hero_features.body: Mark cigarettes and alcohol separately and see the streak that is really holding.

hero_features.title: Emergency mode
hero_features.body: Wait out the craving peak with quick tactics before impulse becomes action.

hero_features.title: Money to a goal
hero_features.body: Every clean day shows what came back to you instead of disappearing into the old habit.

hero_features.title: Friends nearby
hero_features.body: Follow people, like their wins and send support at the moment it matters.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in and continue your current streak.
auth.register_subtitle: Create an account and start collecting clean days, craving wins and support nearby.
auth.name: Name
auth.marketing_opt_in: I want to receive useful emails, updates and special offers.
auth.verify_sent: We sent an email to {email}. Confirm registration from the link within 24 hours.
auth.email_send_failed: Could not send the verification email. The account was not created. Check SMTP login and password.
auth.verification_resent: A new email was sent to {email}.
auth.email_not_verified: Confirm your email first. The verification link in the email is valid for 24 hours.
auth.email_verified: Email confirmed. The reactor is ready to launch.
auth.email_verify_failed: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

email.verify_preheader: One step left: confirm your email and launch the reactor.
email.verify_body: Press the button below to confirm your email and activate your account in {app}.
email.verify_expiry: This link is valid for 24 hours.
email.verify_footer: If you did not create this account, you can safely ignore this email.
email.verify_plain: {name}, confirm your registration in {app}: {url}. This link is valid for 24 hours.
email.invite_kicker: A friend is calling you forward
email.invite_lead: {inviter} sent you an invitation to REACTOR: Freedom.
email.invite_slogan: One clean day is not small. It is proof that control can return.
email.invite_body: {app} helps you track days without cigarettes or alcohol, beat cravings, save money toward a goal and get support from friends.
email.invite_footer: You received this email because a REACTOR user invited you. If it is not relevant, you can ignore it.
email.invite_plain: {name}, {inviter} invited you to {app}. {message} Open it here: {url}

errors.goal_amount: Goal amount must be greater than zero.
errors.avatar_invalid: Choose a valid JPG, PNG or WebP image.
errors.avatar_too_large: The photo must be no larger than 4 MB.

onboarding.habit_title: Which habit do you want to break?
onboarding.habit_subtitle: Pick the reactor target. The dashboard will only show the systems you activate.

habit_options.title: Cigarettes
habit_options.body: Track clean hours, incidents, pack cost and money saved.

habit_options.title: Alcohol
habit_options.body: Track sober time, risky moments and weekly spending.

habit_options.title: Both
habit_options.body: Run a combined control system for both habits.

reason_options.title: Health
reason_options.body: More breath, sleep and steady energy.

reason_options.title: Money
reason_options.body: Turn old spending into visible progress.

reason_options.title: Family
reason_options.body: Be more present for people who matter.

reason_options.title: Self-control
reason_options.body: Prove that the impulse is not in charge.

reason_options.title: Sport and energy
reason_options.body: Build a body that answers faster.

reason_options.title: My own reason
reason_options.body: Write the sentence that will pull you forward.

onboarding.goal_subtitle: Choose a financial target. The dashboard will show how old spending turns into something real.
onboarding.alcohol_warning: If you have tremor, sweating, intense anxiety, insomnia, heart racing or feel unwell without alcohol, do not stop abruptly without medical help.

dashboard.missions_text: Small actions that keep today from drifting back to autopilot.
dashboard.mission_daily_checkin_body: Mark the active habits you kept under control today.
dashboard.mission_craving_body: Use emergency mode before the impulse turns into action.
dashboard.mission_trigger_body: Record what switched the urge on so tomorrow has a counter-plan.
dashboard.trigger_empty: No trigger data yet. The next emergency mode or incident will make this map smarter.
dashboard.weekly_focus_start: Collect more data and protect the next clean decision.
dashboard.weekly_focus_trigger: Prepare a counter-move for “{trigger}” before it appears again.
dashboard.weekly_focus_incidents: Lower the risk environment first: distance, water, movement, support.
dashboard.weekly_focus_consistency: Your rhythm is working. Repeat the same clean close today.
dashboard.status_line: System is online. Hold the line today.
dashboard.mission_text: Close the day clean and use emergency mode before any risky decision.
dashboard.money_title: Money is coming back to you
dashboard.money_story: This week you saved {amount}. You can afford things that used to disappear into cigarettes or alcohol.
dashboard.empty_logs: The journal is empty. The first clean day is already becoming history.

spark.title: Spark
spark.body: The system is online. Every clean choice now leaves a visible trace.

focus.title: Focus
focus.body: You are learning to notice the impulse before it becomes an action.

rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.body: Separate wins are becoming a repeatable daily pattern.

resilience.title: Resilience
resilience.body: A difficult moment is increasingly a task, not a command to relapse.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.body: You see your triggers, the cost of the habit and your working tactics more clearly.

momentum.title: Freedom momentum
momentum.body: Your new rhythm supports you even on low-motivation days.

freedom.title: Freedom
freedom.body: Control is part of your system now. Your work is to strengthen and protect it.

share.button_subtitle: Create a polished card for Telegram, WhatsApp and more.
share.title: Share progress
share.fallback_downloaded: The browser could not share the image directly, so the PNG was downloaded.
share.motivation_smoking: I have not smoked for {days} days.
share.motivation_alcohol: I have not drunk alcohol for {days} days.
share.motivation_both: I have not smoked or drunk alcohol for {days} days.

social.title: Friends and support
social.subtitle: Follow people, celebrate clean choices and send a short line when it matters.
social.empty_feed_body: Find people by name or email, follow them, and their clean days and craving wins will appear here.
social.search_empty: Enter at least two characters to search.
social.invite_title: Invite a friend into your reactor
social.invite_body: Send a short motivational email with a link to registration.
social.invite_message_placeholder: Join me. Let's turn the next clean day into proof.
social.invite_failed: Could not send the invitation email. Check the mail provider log.
social.no_following: You are not following anyone yet.
social.followed: You are following this person now.

no_rollback.title: No Rollback
no_rollback.description: Ninety days at a new level.

log.incident_saved_body: This is not the end. Continue.

settings.title: Settings
settings.photo_help: JPG, PNG or WebP up to 4 MB. The photo will be cropped to a square.
settings.photo_deleted: Photo deleted. Your selected fallback style is active.
settings.reset_body: Opening settings never resets progress. Type RESET only if you really want to restart active streaks.

craving.wave_peak: The wave is loud. Do not negotiate with it.
craving.wave_falling: The wave is already falling. Keep delaying.
craving.wave_control: Control is returning. Choose the next action.

tools.title: Breathing lock
tools.body: Inhale 4, hold 2, exhale 6. Repeat five times.

tools.title: Change location
tools.body: Move to another room or step outside for three minutes.

tools.title: Body reset
tools.body: Water, cold face wash, 20 squats or 300 steps.

craving.support_message: {name}: I am in a craving wave. Please just write me one line: delay it for five minutes.
craving.button_subtitle: Start emergency mode and wait out the craving peak.
craving.title: Do not decide right now.
craving.subtitle: Wait 90 seconds. First lower the noise, then choose from control.
craving.timer_label: wait for the peak to pass
actions: Drink a glass of water and leave the room for 3 minutes.
Do 20 squats. No debate, just movement.
Splash cold water on your face and take 10 slow breaths.
Write: I do not obey the addiction command.
Put on music and walk 300 steps.
Brush your teeth or chew mint gum.
Open a window and breathe slowly 10 times.
Write one sentence of control to yourself.

incident.title: This is an incident, not a failure.
incident.subtitle: Record what happened. The lifetime progress stays. Only the relevant streak restarts.
incident.placeholder: Stress after work, company, boredom, anger...

general: Craving is not an order. It is noise.
You do not need to win your whole life today. Win the next five minutes.
Addiction asks for tax. Today you do not pay.
You are not giving something up. You are taking control back.
craving: The urge is loud, but it is temporary.
Do not let five minutes steal five days.
The impulse wants speed. Your power is delay.
You can survive this wave without feeding it.
morning: Start the day as the person you promised to become.
The first clean choice sets the system tone.
Fuel the reactor with discipline, not regret.
evening: A clean evening is a gift to tomorrow.
Close the day without paying the old tax.
You are almost through the current mission.
Rest is stronger when it is not borrowed from addiction.
Finish the day on your own terms.
afterIncident: An incident is data, not identity.
Reset the streak, not your self-respect.
The system continues. Learn and move.
One event does not erase the work.
No shame spiral. Back to control.
rewardUnlocked: A new badge for a real decision.
milestone: The next level is closer than it looks.
moneySaved: Money is returning to your life.
Every clean day funds your goal.
The goal is not abstract anymore.
